particulars.description: A specific equitable charge over all freehold and leasehold properties and/or the proceeds of sale thereof fixed and floating charges over undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts and the benefits of any licences.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever

classification.description: First fixed and charge & floating charge

particulars.description: First fixed charge on all book and other debts present and future as are not sold to and bought by the chargee under an agreement dated 24/11/95 and by way of floating charge on all proceeds of book and other debts present and future. See the mortgage charge document for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee
